steps.title: Compare bulkheads with riprap
steps.content: The finding is comparative: bulkheads are more strongly negatively correlated with waterbird community integrity than riprap is. A direct illustration should compare a bulkhead-heavy site with a riprap-heavy site and show the bulkhead site has a lower IWCI score.

steps.title: Reject mixed or unclear sites
steps.content: Choice A combines bulkheads and riprap, so it does not isolate the two effects. Choice C compares equal percentages with different percentages, not bulkheads versus riprap. Choice D compares two bulkhead-heavy sites and finds no meaningful difference. The direct comparison is Old Road against Miles. The answer is B.
